SEARCH
Package project2_root

Class AppNavigator

java.lang.Object
project2_root.AppNavigator
public final class AppNavigator extends Object
Central navigation entry point for the JavaFX app. Holds shared models and applies basic session/role checks before switching scenes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static AppNavigator
    getInstance()
    Returns the shared navigator instance.
    void
    initialize(javafx.stage.Stage stage, POSDatabase database)
    Binds the primary stage and database, then rebuilds screen models for the session.
    void
    logout()
    Clears the active session, rebuilds models, and returns to login.
    void
    showCreateOrder()
    Shows the restock-order creation screen for managers.
    void
    showEmployeeEdit()
    Shows the employee editor for managers.
    void
    showLogin()
    Shows the login screen with no session requirements.
    void
    showManagerActions()
    Shows the manager actions hub for managers.
    void
    showManagerDashboard()
    Shows the manager dashboard.
    void
    showMenuItemEdit()
    Shows the menu item editor for managers.
    void
    showOrderDetail(RestockOrder order)
    Opens the detail view for the selected restock order.
    void
    showOrderInventory()
    Shows the inventory-order management view for managers.
    void
    showOrderPageView()
    Shows the cashier order screen.
    void
    showProductUsage()
    Shows the product usage report for managers.
    void
    showXReport()
    Shows the X-report view for managers.
    void
    showZReport()
    Shows the Z-report view for managers.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static AppNavigator getInstance()
      Returns the shared navigator instance.
      Returns:
      the singleton application navigator

    • initialize

      public void initialize(javafx.stage.Stage stage, POSDatabase database)
      Binds the primary stage and database, then rebuilds screen models for the session.
      Parameters:
      stage - the primary JavaFX stage used for scene changes
      database - the database backing application models

    • showLogin

      public void showLogin()
      Shows the login screen with no session requirements.

    • showOrderPageView

      public void showOrderPageView()
      Shows the cashier order screen. Unauthenticated users are redirected to login.

    • showManagerDashboard

      public void showManagerDashboard()
      Shows the manager dashboard. Non-managers are redirected to the order page.

    • showXReport

      public void showXReport()
      Shows the X-report view for managers.

    • showZReport

      public void showZReport()
      Shows the Z-report view for managers.

    • showOrderInventory

      public void showOrderInventory()
      Shows the inventory-order management view for managers.

    • showProductUsage

      public void showProductUsage()
      Shows the product usage report for managers.

    • showCreateOrder

      public void showCreateOrder()
      Shows the restock-order creation screen for managers.

    • showOrderDetail

      public void showOrderDetail(RestockOrder order)
      Opens the detail view for the selected restock order.
      Parameters:
      order - the restock order to display

    • showManagerActions

      public void showManagerActions()
      Shows the manager actions hub for managers.

    • showMenuItemEdit

      public void showMenuItemEdit()
      Shows the menu item editor for managers.

    • showEmployeeEdit

      public void showEmployeeEdit()
      Shows the employee editor for managers.

    • logout

      public void logout()
      Clears the active session, rebuilds models, and returns to login.
